# Scratch Testing

**Summary**: A method to determine the uniaxial compressive strength (UCS) of rock samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-albensaad|Albensaad, 2021]] applied scratch testing to validate hardness--based UCS calculations.

## Key Results and Findings

- Scratch testing UCS matches calculated hardness-based UCS values, but causes sample damage. ([[2021-albensaad|Albensaad, 2021, p. 88]])
